description: A binding agreement establishing the legal framework, terms, and conditions governing the relationship between parties. Includes MSAs, professional services agreements, and vendor contracts.
distinguishing_characteristics: Contains legal terms and conditions (liability, indemnification, warranties)
Defines governing law and dispute resolution
Includes signature blocks for authorized representatives
Establishes the overarching relationship under which SOWs or work orders operate

fields.name: contract_title
fields.description: Title or name of the agreement

fields.name: parties
fields.description: All named parties to the contract

fields.name: expiration_date
fields.description: Date the contract expires or renews

fields.name: termination_provisions
fields.description: Conditions and notice period for termination

fields.name: insurance_requirements
fields.description: Required insurance coverage types and minimums
